name: Page Signal Capture
description: Connects to a local Python GUI bridge and captures high-quality full-page screenshots on demand.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http: https: ws: wss: ws://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:*

toggle-popup.description: Toggle the in-page popup on the active tab
